prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华中科技大学在福建省物理类最低录取位次分别为约1751名、1685名、1259名、1606名、1271名，整体呈波动走势，2023年曾大幅前移至1259名，20 24年回落至1606名，2025年回升至1271名，近两年波动幅度约300–400名，2025年基准位次约1271名；该校在福建省物理类（含医学类）招生计划2021年68人、2 022年65人、2023年65人、2024年67人、2025年67人；2026年招生计划物理类53人、医学类16人，合计69人，较2025年小幅扩招2人，扩招幅度约3%，对竞争压力有轻微 缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第9名（2021–2024年第8名，2025年起第9名），稳居全国前十，属于 顶尖综合性大学，办学层次极高；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于该校食堂在全国高校中排名第一（约35个食堂、人均消费低），以及招生透明度高；抖音 热度总排名第22位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度较高；近年无投档断档记录，声誉稳定向好；拥有机械工程、光学工程、电气 工程3个A+学科，以及计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、物理学、动力工程及工程热物理、管理科学与工程6个A学科，A-及以上学科共17个，学科实力雄厚 ，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、电气工程、电子信息类等专业社会热度持续升温，与该校强势学科高度契合；福建省2026年高考总报名人 数约267900人，较2025年（约252348人）增加约15552人，其中物理类考生估算约203872人，较2025年增加约11776人，竞争加剧；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，在福建省招生规模适中（约69人），无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1271名、2026年物理类考生增加约1.18万人（竞争加剧）、招生计划小幅扩招2人（轻微缓解） 、学校声誉正面且学科实力强劲（吸引高分考生）等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有后移，预测最低位次约1309名，区间1109–1509名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Fujian Province's Physics Category were approximately 1751, 1685, 1259, 1606, and 1271, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, it significantly advanced to 1259, then fell back to 1606 in 2024, and rebounded to 1271 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 300–400 in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1271. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (including medical) in Fujian was 68 in 2021, 65 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 67 in 2024, and 67 in 2025. For 2026, the enrollment plan is 53 for Physics Category and 16 for Medical Category, totaling 69, a slight increase of 2 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 3%, which slightly alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 9th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (8th from 2021 to 2024, 9th since 2025), firmly in the top ten nationally, making it a top-tier comprehensive university with an extremely high level of education. Its reputation in 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to its cafeteria ranking first among national universities (about 35 cafeterias, low per capita consumption) and high admission transparency. Its Douyin popularity ranks 22nd overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high attention from applicants. There have been no records of admission interruptions in recent years, and its reputation is stable and improving. It has three A+ disciplines: Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering, as well as six A disciplines: Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, and Management Science and Engineering, with a total of 17 A- and above disciplines, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information are experiencing increasing social popularity, highly aligned with the university's strong disciplines. In 2026, the total number of Fujian Province's college entrance examination registrants is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,552 compared to 2025 (about 252,348). Among them, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 203,872, an increase of about 11,776 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with a moderate enrollment scale in Fujian (about 69), and no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1271, the increase of about 11,800 Physics Category candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), a slight expansion of 2 in enrollment plan (slight alleviation), positive university reputation and strong academic strength (attracting high-scoring candidates), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1309, with a range of 1109–1509.

- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Qiming Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Energy and Power Class
- Mechanical Class
- Materials Class
- Physics Class
- Digital Economy (AI Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1309, range 1109–1509. Candidates with ranking within 1109 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Qiming Experimental Class); those with ranking between 1109–1309 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Computer Class, Electrical, Optoelectronics, etc.) while also attempting Tier 1; those with ranking between 1309–1509 should mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, and can try some Tier 2 majors; candidates with ranking exceeding 1509 have a lower admission probability and are advised to consider other institutions.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Fujian Province's History Category were approximately 813, 906, 1006, 1096, and 1134 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 321 places over the past 5 years and an average annual backward shift of about 64 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1134. The enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 13 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan for History Category is 8, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 9th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top ten in the country, with an extremely high level of schooling, which also strongly attracts History Category candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, with the best cafeteria conditions in the country and high enrollment transparency. On Douyin, its popularity is 'relatively hot', with overall application attention at an upper-middle level and no negative public opinion interference. Related to History Category admissions, the discipline evaluations include Business Administration A- and Journalism and Communication A-. Although majors like Law and Public Administration are not individually rated, they rely on the university's comprehensive strength. Overall, the strength of liberal arts among 985 universities is at an upper-middle level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Law and Journalism and Communication is polarized (Law is relatively hot, while Journalism and Communication has some dissuasive voices), and Business Administration is stable. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province college entrance examination is about 267,900, with an estimated 64,028 History Category candidates, an increase of about 3,776 compared to 2025 (60,252), leading to slightly intensified competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with a small enrollment scale in Fujian Province's History Category (8 people), and no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of History Category rankings (average annual backward shift of about 64 places), the increase of about 3,776 History Category candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), unchanged enrollment plan (no relief), and positive school reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1154, with a range of 954 to 1354.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 1154, with a range of 954 to 1354. Candidates with rankings within 954 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 (Law, Business Administration); those with rankings between 954 and 1154 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Journalism and Communication) while also attempting Tier 1; those with rankings between 1154 and 1354 should mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings exceeding 1354 have a lower probability of admission. The History Category enrollment plan is only 8 people, making competition relatively intense. It is recommended to position yourself reasonably.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology enrolls medical students separately in Fujian Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 1848, 1395, 1423, 2644, and 11141 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, the plan was stable at 9 students, with rankings fluctuating narrowly between 1400 and 1850; in 2024, enrollment expanded to 10 students, and the ranking dropped to 2644; in 2025, enrollment significantly expanded to 18 students (adding new majors such as Forensic Medicine, Basic Medicine, Pediatrics, Information Management and Information Systems, etc.), and the ranking plummeted to 11141. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 16 students (a reduction of about 11.1%), mainly reducing quotas for Clinical Medicine and Pediatrics. Supply-demand elasticity calculations indicate that the ranking will rebound somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a member of the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with strong disciplines in Clinical Medicine and Basic Medicine. Its affiliated Union Hospital and Tongji Hospital are among the top tertiary hospitals in the country, exerting strong appeal to Fujian candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of medical majors remains consistently high, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine (eight-year program, Outstanding Physician Experimental Class) and Stomatology being highly competitive. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Fujian Province is relatively limited. In 2026, Huazhong University of Science and Technology will only enroll 16 students in medical majors, which is a small-scale enrollment, making rankings sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the enrollment reduction factor in 2026 and the popularity of medical applications, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical majors in Fujian Province in 2026 will be approximately 10198, rebounding (becoming harder to enter) compared to 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 9892 and 10504.
